tweets.topic: SBI warns customers: Scammers are sending fake 'bank letters' with these app links
tweets.tweet: SBI ne warn kiya hai ki scammers fake 'bank letters' bhej rahe hain jinmein malicious app links hain. Ab humein har ₹100

tweets.topic: Beware of Online Scams During Flipkart Big Billion Days, Amazon Great Indian Festival & Other Festive Sales
tweets.tweet: Online festive sales jaise Flipkart Big Billion Days aur Amazon Great Indian Festival ke dauran cyber fraud se consumers ₹500 crore se zyada gawa dete

tweets.topic: India smartphone market surges 8% on-year by value in 2025, led by Apple, Samsung: Counterpoint
tweets.tweet: India smartphone market 2025 mein 8% on-year value surge karega, Apple aur Samsung is growth ko lead kar rahe hain as per Counterpoint. Toh kya ab humein ₹1 lakh ke phone ₹80,000 mein milenge, ya ₹80,000 wale ₹1 lakh mein? Consumer ko value kab milegi? #Smartphones #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Scams don’t stop at telecom: India needs platform-neutral communication rules
tweets.tweet: India mein online scams ab telecom se nikal kar messaging apps aur social media tak फैल गए हैं, jahan ₹1000 crore se zyada
